purpose: Browse, view, edit, add, and delete command markdown files across three scopes: Synapse built-in (read-only), Project-level _commands/ (read-only here), and User-level (full CRUD plus folder creation). Layout is sidebar (collapsible folder groups with command lists) + viewer pane on the right. Viewer has four states: 'placeholder' (default), 'view' (read content), 'edit' (markdown textarea editor), and 'generate' (Claude-CLI-driven natural-language command synthesis via api.generateCommand or api.generateUserCommand). The CommandGenerator sub-component spawns Claude with a description prompt to produce a comprehensive new command file rather than the bare COMMAND_TEMPLATE used by manual edit. Loads three command sets via api.listCommands / api.listProjectCommands(projectDir) / api.listUserCommands.
gotchas: Folder identity for User commands uses 'General' as a sentinel for the root user-commands folder — when activeUserFolder === null it means General. Several handlers (handleNewUserCommand, selectCommand) translate between 'General' string and null.

The Synapse and Project sections are always readOnly — passing the readOnly prop hides the new-command + button. The User section is the only writable place; mixing edit-attempts elsewhere will silently no-op due to the readOnly guard.

selectCommand uses three different IPC variants (api.getUserCommand, api.getCommand with dir, api.getCommand without dir) — ordering of isUser then commandsDir checks is critical; flipping the order breaks user-folder routing.

Generation flow: CommandGenerator's onGenerated re-uses newCommandFolder which is set in handleNewUserCommand — if user manually swaps active state during generation, the post-gen selectCommand may target the wrong folder.
Uses native confirm() / alert() throughout instead of themed modals.
loadCommands runs three IPC calls in parallel and just sets state when each resolves — no error handling. If listCommands rejects, the panel stays empty silently.
patterns: Multi-scope sidebar with collapsible folders and per-folder Add (+) buttons — same expand/collapse pattern as IDE FileExplorer but lighter weight.
Viewer state machine ('placeholder'|'view'|'edit'|'generate') drives which sub-component renders — clean state isolation between view/edit/generate flows.
User can choose between bare-template manual creation (CommandEditor with COMMAND_TEMPLATE) and AI-generated rich command (CommandGenerator).
conventions: Sub-components (CommandFolder, CommandViewer, CommandEditor, CommandGenerator) live in the same file rather than separate modules — convention for tightly-coupled modal-internal pieces.
